items.content:
About This Role

We are hiring a Senior Product Manager to lead our Growth team. In this role, you will own the strategy and execution for user acquisition, activation, and retention. You will leverage data, experimentation, and customer insights to identify the highest-leverage opportunities and ship features that move the needle on our key growth metrics.

This is a highly cross-functional role that requires collaboration with engineering, design, data science, and marketing teams.

Responsibilities

  • Define and execute the growth product roadmap aligned with company OKRs
  • Identify growth opportunities through funnel analysis, user research, and competitive intelligence
  • Design and run experiments to validate hypotheses and optimize conversion
  • Work closely with engineering and design to ship features on a rapid iteration cycle
  • Track and report on growth KPIs to leadership, providing data-driven recommendations
  • Build frameworks and processes that enable scalable, repeatable growth

Requirements

  • 6+ years of product management experience, with at least 3 years focused on growth
  • Proven track record of driving measurable improvements in acquisition, activation, or retention
  • Strong analytical skills and experience with tools like Amplitude, Mixpanel, or similar
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills
  • Experience working in agile development environments

Nice to Have

  • Experience with PLG (product-led growth) strategies
  • Background in B2B SaaS or marketplace products
  • MBA or advanced degree in a relevant field
